title: US and Iran agree to 2-week ceasefire as Trump seizes diplomatic offramp instead of escalation
summary: The US and Iran have agreed to a 2-week ceasefire, with Iran accepting the terms and agreeing to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. US President Donald Trump announced that he would suspend attacks on Iran for two weeks, provided Tehran agreed to the safe opening of the strait. The ceasefire comes after a series of intense airstrikes and threats of escalation, with negotiations set to begin in Islamabad on Friday.

title: Republican Clayton Fuller wins Georgia special election runoff
summary: Clayton Fuller, a Republican and former district attorney, has won a special election runoff in Georgia's 14th District, defeating Democrat Shawn Harris with 54% of the vote. Fuller, who campaigned on his loyalty to President Donald Trump, will serve out the remainder of the term vacated by former Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene. His win helps pad the razor-thin Republican majority in the House, but his relatively narrow margin of victory could be a warning sign for Republicans ahead of the midterms.

title: Oil Prices Plummet Dramatically as Stock Futures Soar Following Ceasefire Announcement
summary: Oil prices plummeted 18% to below $93 a barrel after US President Donald Trump announced a temporary two-week ceasefire with Iran, aiming to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The ceasefire announcement also led to a surge in stock futures, with Dow futures rising by 1,000 points, and a decrease in Treasury yields. The ceasefire, which has been accepted by Iran and Israel, is expected to allow for the passage of oil through the Strait of Hormuz, a key shipping route, for the next two weeks.

title: Liberals expand majority in Wisconsin Supreme Court: 3 key takeaways from Tuesday’s election night results
summary: The Wisconsin Supreme Court has expanded its liberal majority to 5-2 after Chris Taylor's victory over Maria Lazar in the statewide election. Taylor, the Democrat-backed liberal, won by more than 20 percentage points, marking the fourth consecutive victory for liberal candidates in the nonpartisan Wisconsin Supreme Court elections. In a separate election, Republican Clay Fuller won a special election in Georgia's 14th Congressional District, but by a smaller margin than expected, with Democrat Shawn Harris securing 44% of the vote.

title: Hurricanes edge Bruins in OT to clinch division title
summary: The Carolina Hurricanes clinched the Metropolitan Division title by defeating the Boston Bruins 6-5 in overtime. Jaccob Slavin scored the winning goal 1:13 into overtime, securing the division title for the Hurricanes. The win came in the Hurricanes' home finale, with the team now having four games remaining in the season.
